query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN publishedModel = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as published, SUM(CASE WHEN awayModelSpread IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_spread FROM games WHERE gameDate = '2026-03-19' AND sport = 'NCAAM';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3AW8r3RRauadYzS.root --database MW3FicTy7ae3qrm8dx8Lua --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN publishedModel = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as published, SUM(CASE WHEN awayModelSpread IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_spread FROM games WHERE gameDate = '2026-03-19' AND sport = 'NCAAM';
